fiveStar.name: Sabazios
fiveStar.skill:
Increase critical damage by 36.3%/36.3%/47.2%/47.2%/58.1%/58.1%/69.0%.
When gaining Mettle stacks, increase critical rate by 8.2%/10.7%/10.7%/13.2%/13.2%/15.7%/15.7% for 2 turns. This effect stacks up to 2 times.
When Sanada activates a critical with a skill, Theurgy, or Resonance, increase that damage by 34.0%/44.0%/44.0%/54.0%/54.0%/64.0%/64.0%.

fourStar.name: Wicked Cestus
fourStar.skill:
Increase Attack by 12.0%/12.0%/16.0%/16.0%/20.0%/20.0%/24.0%.
Also, when Grit is at 2 or more stacks, increase Attack by 22.0%/29.0%/29.0%/36.0%/36.0%/43.0%/43.0%.
